MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MAERSK LINE LIMITED MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Joseph S. May, Law Offices of Joseph S. May (415) 781-3333, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; John Giffin, Esq. of Keesal, Young & Logan (415) 398-6000 appearing for Defendant and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and modified its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike granted with ten days leave to amend for plaintiff to allege specific facts supporting his punitive damages claim. The Court adds: Defendant has ten days to respond from service of the Amended Complaint. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
